meta.title: The U‑2 Spy Plane just made history AGAIN
meta.description:
A U.S. Air Force U-2 Spy Plane just broke new records to celebrate the 70th anniversary of the aircraft's first test flight. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sandboxxnews
